title: Progression Beta Systems, Premium Expansion, and UI Overhaul
changes: Progression phase flow expanded into a full lobby, Round 0 standby, deckbuilding, dueling, and reward system.
Round 0 starter deck claiming and kickoff flow now gates progression properly for the whole series.
Ready-up, reward handling, and round advancement were rebuilt around live server-side progression RPCs.
Vault system added as a full separate page with binder-to-vault and vault-to-binder movement support.
Feature Slots was split out from container opening and upgraded into animated machine-style flows.
Store, inventory, exchange, rewards, and item backend systems were expanded to support feature coins and advanced item rules.
Dedicated modal-driven item usage was added for progression inventory effects instead of placeholder redirects.
Container opener now has a cinematic pack reveal sequence and improved box/pack presentation.
Phases and Banlist now open real in-app modal views from the series menu.
Card Database clicks now open full-screen card art previews like the rest of the system.
Premium Store systems were added for themes, music, showcase cosmetics, UI cosmetics, and premium loadouts.
Settings and profile flows were reorganized so showcase settings, owned cosmetics, and purchased UI effects are easier to manage.
Theme styling was reworked across the app to use richer multi-accent color treatment on panels, borders, glows, and hover states.
New theme backgrounds and palettes were added for Cyber Dragon, Egyptian God, Kuriboh, and Traptrix.
Admin tooling was expanded with Round Rewards, Store Editor improvements, Player Items inspection/removal tools, and container/store management polish.

title: Card Database & Gameplay Data Layer
changes: Card Database system implemented.
Connected to live Supabase cards table (14,524 cards).
Full Yu-Gi-Oh card library now searchable in the app.
Server-side pagination implemented for large dataset performance.
Default grid layout set to 50 cards per page (5 columns × 10 rows).
Advanced search system added.
Toggle between name search and description search.
Partial match and case-insensitive search supported.
Full filter panel system implemented including:
Card category filters: Monster, Spell, Trap.
Monster subtype filters: Normal, Effect, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, Pendulum, Link, Token.
Spell / Trap subtype filters implemented.
Monster trait filters: Tuner, Flip, Gemini, Union, Spirit, Toon.
Additional filters implemented including Attribute, Race / Type, OT pool, Level / Rank range, Link rating range, Pendulum scale range, ATK range, and DEF range.
Type-index caching system created for fast subtype filtering.
Supabase queries optimized for large dataset performance.
Card grid UI implemented.
Lazy loading card images implemented.
Automatic fallback image handling for missing art.
Grid hover preview system added.
Click-lock card preview behavior added.
Card preview panel implemented displaying full card image, name, description, and card identifiers (type, race, attribute, etc.).
Conditional identifier rendering implemented (only relevant fields displayed).
BBCode parsing implemented for card description formatting ([b], [i], [u]).
Fullscreen card art viewer implemented.
Page jump navigation added to pagination system.

title: Platform Foundation & Series Management Systems
changes: Admin Panel foundation completed.
Admin-only route protection implemented.
Admin dropdown access connected through launcher header.
Admin dashboard sections added for applications, reviewed decisions, players, and foundation tools.
Back-navigation support added to Admin Panel.
Profile modal system added.
Settings modal system added.
Launcher layout now manages profile, settings, and patch notes modals globally.
Header dropdown expanded with Profile, Settings, Logout, and Admin Panel visibility logic.
Series Management system implemented.
Admins can now create and own series.
Only one globally active series can exist at a time.
Series can now be activated, paused, resumed, and deleted.
Admins can only manage their own series.
Series membership system implemented using series_players.
Owner slot logic added.
Membership now drives slot counting and progression access dependency.
Application approvals now create real series membership entries.
Application system upgraded.
Applications now attach to specific series.
Duplicate applications prevented.
Approve / deny / ban outcomes implemented.
Reviewed decision history added.
Role synchronization improved.
Login now correctly maps users based on active series membership.
Active-series members resolve as Duelist.
Non-members resolve as Applicant.
Admin and blocked role handling preserved.
Progression access dependency upgraded.
Progression access now depends on active series + series membership.
Foundation prepared for future binders, decks, inventory, and progression-linked systems.

title: Launcher Atmosphere & Theme Systems
changes: Theme system introduced with multiple selectable launcher themes.
Theme-based background images implemented.
Theme-based soundtrack system added.
Music fade-in and fade-out system implemented.
Smooth music transition when switching themes.
Volume and mute settings now persist via localStorage.
Theme accent color system added (--theme-accent).
UI glow colors now change automatically per theme.
Header accents react to theme color.
Footer border reacts to active theme.
Launcher logo aura glow added.
Slow breathing glow animation added to launcher logo.
Logo glow color adapts to theme accent color.
Background motion system added.
Slow zoom and horizontal drift applied to launcher backgrounds.
Ambient atmosphere system introduced.
Animated fog layer added.
Floating particle system added.
Particles tinted with theme accent color.
Particle density increased and distributed across full screen.
Header UI polish improvements.
Theme-based hover glow for profile button.
Logo hover glow effect added.
Dropdown menu glow styling improved.

title: Initial Launcher Build
changes: Mode Select launcher interface completed.
Progression (Ranked Mode) panel introduced.
Casual / Deck Game panel placeholder added.
Image-based mode cards implemented with hover zoom effects.
Active user profile card added to Mode Select.
Launcher footer added with version display and patch notes access.
Patch Notes modal system introduced with JSON-driven rendering.

title: User & Mode Systems
changes: UserContext system added for managing user state.
Role badge system implemented (Admin+, Admin, Duelist, Applicant).
Mode access logic implemented for progression states.
Progression access states added (accepted, pending, restricted).

title: Navigation & Layout Framework
changes: Router navigation system implemented.
Routes created for /, /mode, /mode/progression, and /mode/deckgame.
LauncherLayout system created for shared background, overlay, and footer.
Application page structure established.

title: Project Initialization
changes: Project Onyx web application framework created.
React + Vite development environment established.
Initial project structure created.
Login splash screen UI implemented.
